symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select a, b from normal_table order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 2", "100 102")) (session/session_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select a, b from normal_table order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 2", "100 102")) (session/session_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily adds tests for retrying DML on local temporary tables. The available evidence does not indicate a targeted flaky-test stabilization change with a clear intermittent failure signature, so we conservatively classify it as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select a, b from normal_table order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 2", "100 102")) (session/session_test.go)
